# Raafat Furniture

> Raafat Furniture is an Egyptian maker of handcrafted, luxury furniture. We design and build sofas, armchairs, bedroom sets, dining tables, office furniture, and fully custom pieces — and ship them across Egypt, the United States, and worldwide. Our website lets customers view pieces in interactive 3D and place them in their own room at true-to-life scale using augmented reality (AR) before buying.

## What we sell
- Living room: sofas, sectionals, sofa sets, armchairs, recliners
- Bedroom: beds, wardrobes, and bedroom sets
- Dining: dining tables and sets
- Office furniture
- Kids & youth rooms
- Coffee tables, side tables, TV units, consoles
- Decor, accessories, curtains, mattresses, and pillows
- Custom / made-to-order furniture built to the customer's exact dimensions, colours, and materials

## Why customers choose Raafat Furniture
- Handcrafted quality built to last, from a long-standing Egyptian furniture house
- Interactive 3D preview of pieces, with live colour and material switching
- Augmented Reality "view in your room" — see the real size and finish in your space before buying, from any phone, no app required
- Custom orders made to your specification
- Bilingual site (English and Egyptian Arabic), fully right-to-left aware
- Transparent pricing shown in Egyptian Pounds (EGP) for Egypt and US Dollars (USD) internationally

## Who we serve
- Primary markets: Egypt and the United States
- Also ship worldwide
- Prices for Egyptian orders include 14% VAT; international orders are export (tax-free), with any local import duties the buyer's responsibility

## How ordering works
- Order online for showroom pickup (Egypt) or delivery (Egypt and worldwide)
- Payment options: InstaPay, bank transfer, cash on pickup (Egypt), and card payments including Apple Pay and Google Pay
- Delivery orders are paid in full at checkout; shipping is quoted per order
- Every order gets a unique confirmation number and can be tracked online

## Locations (Egypt)
- Cairo: 66 Mohamed Refaat Street, next to KFC, El Nozha El Gadida
- Minya: 6 Mostafa Kamel Street, Ard Sultan
- New Minya: Corner Plaza Mall, 2nd Floor, Third District
- Phone / WhatsApp: +20 1010279777
- Hours: 12:00–22:00, Monday–Saturday

## Contact
Phone/WhatsApp: +20 1010279777. Visit any showroom above, or use the contact form on the website.
